notes: I disabled uplay overlay but it might be not necessary, I also disabled vsync. I tried adaptive sync but wasn't happy with it. First 1-2 seconds after loading map framerate is really low, but after super smooth on ultra settings. Uplay works now, but game launch slowly.

title: Assassin's Creed® Origins

notes: Installs without issues. When Uplay are installed and once login to your Ubisoft account, disable Uplay Overlay to prevent the game stall when start the graphic engine (a black screen). Close Uplay and run again (click Play)  to activate the game license. Once completed, the game will start without problems.
title: Assassin's Creed® Origins

notes: Only played through initial opening sequence.  Other than a few very minor graphical glitches, everything seemed to be working 100%.
title: Assassin's Creed® Origins

notes: Game stopped rendering (permanently freezed) two times within one hour of gameplay
title: Assassin's Creed® Origins

notes: Installs and runs without problems. My Nvidia laptop requires primus_vk to the game use the dedicated GPU. When Steam finishes the initial setup, and made the login to your Ubisoft Account using Uplay Launcher, open Settings tab and disable Uplay Overlay, to prevent the black screen at beginning. Once started the game for the first time, it starts at 720p, but this can be changed using the game options tools. Now the game starts always at 1080p, and the framerates oscillates between 30 to 60 fps at high settings.
title: Assassin's Creed® Origins

notes:
Game worked perfectly after disabling Uplay overlay. Uplay overlay seemed to cause a black screen on startup.
Experiences a lot of stutters the first 10 minutes, but gets really smooth after that.
Runs very well using 2560x1080p at high settings with dynamic resolution enabled (60fps target).
Used proton 4.11-3; ProtonDB don't have that option yet.
title: Assassin's Creed® Origins

gpu: ATI Technologies Inc. AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT
notes: If you have a ps4 dualshock, this might be a silver - on occasion the layout changes from regular to "mouse", meaning the touchpad on the ps4 becomes a mouse pad. I haven't noticed a proper STR for this. If you use a keyboard (or maybe a different controller), this game works straight out of the box. No tweaks needed.
title: Assassin's Creed® Origins

notes: Uplay login works, however, the game itself does not start at all. Game freezes on a black screen. I have to forcefully terminate the application after a few minutes as it does nothing and uses up 98% cpu .
title: Assassin's Creed® Origins

notes: Disabled uPlay overlay. Works perfectly after that. Going for full game completion, so far (~character level 20) no issues at all.
title: Assassin's Creed® Origins

notes: After changing from default resolution to fullscreen the game would not start properly. Needed to edit ACO.ini and set game to use maximised windowed mode.
title: Assassin's Creed® Origins
